results.description: Verify both docs index files exist and AGENTS references documentation indexing.
results.command: idx=0; nav=0; agents=0; [ -f docs/INDEX.md ] && idx=1; [ -f docs/NAVIGATION.md ] && nav=1; refs=$(rg -n "docs/INDEX.md|Documentation Index|scripts/intelligence/generate_docs_index.py" AGENTS.md | wc -l); [ "$refs" -ge 1 ] && agents=1; echo "INDEX_EXISTS=$idx"; echo "NAVIGATION_EXISTS=$nav"; echo "AGENTS_DOC_INDEX_REF=$agents"; if [ "$idx" -eq 1 ] && [ "$nav" -eq 1 ] && [ "$agents" -eq 1 ]; then echo "ASSERTION=PASS"; else echo "ASSERTION=FAIL"; exit 1; fi
failure_reasons: stdout does not match regex: NAVIGATION_EXISTS=1
